title: BTDR Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026
text: Bitdeer Technologies (BTDR) analyst consensus shows strong buy ratings for the stock. 10 analysts covering BTDR stock have a consensus rating of Strong Buy with an average price target of $29.9, forecasting 169.13% upside from current levels. Analyst estimates vary significantly, with price targets ranging from $25.00 to $43.50 USD, reflecting the wide range of views on the company's value. 80% of analysts recommend a Strong Buy, 20% suggest Holding, with no sell ratings. The 2026 price prediction consensus is $24.20 across analyst forecasts. Analyst price targets reflect expectations for significant revenue growth driven by Bitcoin mining expansion and AI cloud services momentum. Recent analyst updates following Q1 2026 earnings included Needham raising its target to $19, Rosenblatt to $25, and Cantor Fitzgerald to $15. However, some bearish outliers project more conservative valuations around $5.49 per share, reflecting cryptocurrency mining sector volatility and Bitcoin price dependency.
